trust_boundary: Dogfood corpus records are static unsafe contract review evidence, not a proof of memory safety, not UB-free status, and not a Miri result unless an exact witness receipt is attached.

repositories.primary_exercise: Raw pointer reads/writes, Vec::set_len, pointer arithmetic, unsafe impls, owner inference
MaybeUninit, Vec::set_len, raw pointer reads/writes, UTF-8, drop/deallocation cards
SIMD target-feature contracts, pointer arithmetic, unchecked constructors
Large-file syntax scanning, MaybeUninit, pointer arithmetic, unchecked/infallible operations, dedupe
Vec::from_raw_parts, slice construction, ownership-transfer review cards
Unsafe Send/Sync, atomics, raw pointer, and ownership-transfer cards

recorded_outcomes.notes: Documented target_feature declarations moved from guard_missing to guarded_unwitnessed without claiming target-feature availability, site execution, or soundness.

limitations: The corpus is selected and capped, not ecosystem-wide calibration.
Saved-output artifacts are local_untracked under target/dogfood-work.
Outcome comparison reads saved snapshots only and does not rerun analysis.
Dogfood records do not execute witness tools or make policy decisions.
